description: Generate a report of Between-Search Errors (BSE) and Within-Search Errors (WSE) summed across all trials for each participant using the Spatial Working Memory (SWM) click stream data at ~/pebl/data/swm_clickstream.csv. BSE is defined as clicking a box that yielded a token in a strictly previous search of the same trial, and WSE is defined as clicking an empty box already clicked during the current search; if a click qualifies as a BSE, it does not count as a WSE. Exclude participant 'sub-999' from group calculations due to a touchscreen malfunction (Total WSE > 100). Save the results to ~/pebl/analysis/swm_report.json with keys 'participants' (list of objects with
